title: Bright Ideas Christmas Catering Crackers Box of 50 10 Inch Crackers for Tableware, Tree and Santa Festive Design With Sticker, Party Hat and Joke. BI0601.
features: Ensure all of your festive frolics go off with a bang with this 50-pack box of cheerful Christmas Crackers – Ho Ho Ho. Each cracker measure 4.5cm x 25.5cm (10″) and inside each one you will find a snap, a paper hat, a joke and a sticker sheet.
Fun and super safe for children – no plastic toys to worry about in these crackers.
Two fun and festive designs in each box for a great end of term Christmas Party or gathering.
Perfect for all Christmas events …. put out on the dining table and let the fun begin!

For your safety please pull both ends of the cracker at arms length, firmly and sharply away from your face. Ensure that crackers are pulled away from breakable objects, other people and pets. Not suitable for children under 3 years, adult supervision advised.
description: Product Description Great value and with lots to go around with the super box of 50 crackers no-one will be disappointed. Whatever you decide our Christmas Crackers are excellent value for money and a firm favourite with kid’s everywhere. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 36 months due to small parts. Please retain this information for future reference.
